title: schultesia lisianthoides
intro: Schultesia lisianthoides, also known as the "lisianthoid Schultesia," is a species of flowering plant in the Rubiaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The health benefits of Schultesia lisianthoides include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat wounds and infections. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant's roots and stems to create a decoction.
